name: Trout with Almonds & Cucumber Batons
recipeIngredient: 4 trout fillets (6 to 8 oz), cleaned and trimmed
1 cucumber, sliced into half-moons about a quarter-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large frying pan that can accommodate all the trout in one layer.
2. Add the trout and sauté gently for 3 minutes.
3. Turn the trout over and sauté for another 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Increase the heat until the oil begins to foam, then add the cucumber pieces.
5. Spread the cucumber around the pan, followed by the almonds.
6. Continue sautéing carefully until the almonds begin to turn golden.
7. Remove the pan from the heat and serve on warm plates with a generous amount of cucumber and almonds placed on each plate.
